Interface DeploymentConstants

All Known Implementing Classes:
ArchiveReader, AxisConfigBuilder, CorbaDeployer, CustomAxisConfigurator, DeploymentEngine, DescriptionBuilder, FileSystemConfigurator, ModuleBuilder, RepositoryListener, ServiceBuilder, ServiceGroupBuilder, URLBasedAxisConfigurator, WarBasedAxisConfigurator, WSInfoList
public interface DeploymentConstants
Constants used during service/module deployment.
